articles.title: These cities are blanketed with wildfire smoke. Here’s what to know about bad air quality.

articles.description: “I met with a financial representative who was not aware that AT&T was the shortened form of American Telephone and Telegraph.”

articles.title: Oil is facing a supply crunch — and the war in Iran isn’t the only problem
articles.description: Constraints on Russia’s refining system have added to the existing crisis, strategists at J.P. Morgan said.

articles.title: Retail sales get a boost from car buyers and Amazon Prime Day. The economy hasn’t lost its mojo.
articles.description: Sales at retailers rose in June as Americans bought more new cars and spent more online during Amazon’s annual summer sales event, signaling steady growth in the U.S. economy.

articles.title: AI is killing the cover letter — but here’s when it still pays to send one
articles.description: “For really everyone other than AI providers, the process is broken.”

articles.title: GE boosts profit outlook, but stock falls as booming order growth cools

articles.title: Who qualifies for the bigger IRS tax break on gas — and how to get the most of it

articles.title: The Lehman Bros. moment of the AI bubble is coming, says this critic warning of fallout for tech stocks and the entire market

articles.title: You are missing the bond deal of the decade — and it is guaranteed to beat inflation

articles.title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline

articles.title: Renewed Hormuz hostilities drive ECB rates rethink amid ‘extremely volatile’ outlook
articles.description: Several consecutive days of strikes exchanged between the U.S. and Iran have cast uncertainty on the European Central Bank's interest rate decision next week.

articles.title: China posts slowest quarterly growth since 2022 as investment slumps, fanning stimulus calls

articles.title: Consumer prices rose 3.5% annually in June, less than expected as energy prices eased
articles.description: The consumer price index in June was expected to increase 3.8% from a year ago.

articles.title: India's inflation accelerates to 4.38% in June, exceeding forecasts

articles.title: China consumer price growth weakens in June while producer inflation rises to near 4-year high
